annotation_basis: Blind support annotation from source O&M text only. Pairs, chains, questions, and lifecycle events were curated without consulting model outputs. When source support was weak, the item was omitted instead of guessed.
timestamp_policy: Synthetic relative timestamps encode manual procedure order only. They are not real-world event dates and must not be interpreted as operational history.

lifecycle_events.description: BATOM_001 records an active leak complaint at the left-rear coolant-plate outlet.
BATOM_001 performs targeted correction and verification at the outlet-side boundary.
BATOM_002 opens with a front-manifold-face complaint tied to seal compression or clamp load.
BATOM_002 replaces or reseats only the failed manifold, seal, bolt stack, or hose support item.
BATOM_003 documents a failed chiller-inlet connector boundary before replacement.
BATOM_003 installs and proves the replacement chiller-inlet connector stack.
